sourcePrompt: A flying-fox fruit bat roosting upside-down from a bare branch, about forty centimeters head to folded tail, hanging by two hooked feet. The leathery dark wings wrap the body like a closed cloak, with the small clawed thumbs peeking at the fold, while the fox-like head hangs lowest - a furry muzzle, round dark eyes and pointed ears. Russet-brown fur against black wing membrane, still and watchful.
